race.description: Country Fest 12-13th June @ Cluden Park Hcp
race.comment: COLOURS OF AUTUMN (10) finished a length back from the winner last start at this track and is down in weight this time. Has a win and five minor placings at this journey from seven starts and should prove tough to beat. The well-related ARMOUR FORCE (6) (half to G2 winner and G1 placed Bella Martini) was in the placings when just under two lengths away from the winner last time at Cairns on a soft track and drops in the weights. Backmarker who gets home hard and rates among the main hopes. ODEGAARD (9) was a winner over 1180m at Home Hill last time out, dropping out early before coming home with a powerful run to score by a nose. Can figure in the finish. TURBEAU (5) has been just out of the placings in two runs since a break, the latest when fifth, beaten 3 lengths, over 1300m at Mackay. Will strip fitter now and is all set to find winning form.
